outcome: Analyze the 500 most-starred AI GitHub repos as of June 2026, extract real demand signals, classify each repo by industry and business function, and publish a live interactive demand heatmap on GitHub Pages with every repo having a verified GitHub link.
binary_criterion: A live GitHub Pages site is published containing a demand heatmap built from all 500 most-starred AI GitHub repositories as of June 2026, each with a verified GitHub link, mapped to industries and business functions.
